source.name: City of Cincinnati, Department of Finance
source.note: The city's Finance Department page documents the current and immediately prior rate. Earlier rate history is not currently published by the city. If you have a verifiable primary source (ordinance number + effective date) for earlier changes, please open a GitHub issue.

description: Cincinnati charges a flat municipal income tax on wages, salaries, and net business income of residents and of non-residents working within the city. Because it is flat, the nominal rate is identical at every income level.

history.source_note: Effective 10/02/2020. Reduction from 2.1% was enacted as part of Issue 7 (the 'Permanent Improvements' measure).

Rate in effect immediately prior to 10/02/2020. Widely reported to have been in place since the late 1980s, but this site does not assert an earlier 'effective_from' date without a primary-source ordinance citation.
